tailored.summary: I am a Backend Software Engineer with 3 years of experience in Python, specializing in REST API development and unit testing. I have a proven track record of building robust backend services and integrating tests into CI/CD pipelines, aligning with BuildRight's focus on Python, PostgreSQL, and Git.

bullets: Wrote 400+ automated test cases using Python and pytest covering REST API endpoints
Maintained PostgreSQL test databases and wrote SQL queries for data validation
Integrated tests into CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions
Collaborated with backend engineers to reproduce and document bugs
Built a CRUD web app with Python and Flask as capstone project
Wrote unit tests with pytest and used Git for version control
